name: research-deep
description: Deep research team. Librarians retrieve authoritative docs and OSS examples; oracles synthesize and reason about trade-offs.

members.name: librarian-1
members.prompt: Retrieve official docs for: {{TASK}}. Focus on API surface, config defaults, and recent breaking changes. Report via team_send_message.

members.name: librarian-2
members.prompt: Find 2-3 production OSS implementations of: {{TASK}}. Compare architecture choices and edge case handling. Skip tutorials.

members.name: librarian-3
members.prompt: Survey adjacent technologies and alternatives for: {{TASK}}. Identify trade-offs and migration paths.

members.name: oracle-2
members.prompt: Synthesize librarian findings on: {{TASK}}. Identify gaps, contradictions, and high-stakes decisions for the lead to resolve.
